Hero.name: Gustavo Nicolau
Hero.description: I merge technology and creativity to build immersive and functional digital experiences. Working with React, Node.js, and modern performance-driven architecture.

About.heading: About Me
About.paragraph: I'm a passionate software engineer with 5+ years of experience building scalable web applications. I love turning complex problems into simple, beautiful, and intuitive solutions.

frontend.title: Frontend Development
frontend.description: Expert in React, TypeScript, and modern web technologies

backend.title: Backend Development
backend.description: Proficient in Node.js, Python, and database design

cloud.title: Cloud Architecture
cloud.description: Experience with AWS, Azure, and scalable systems

design.title: UI/UX Design
design.description: Strong eye for design and user experience

Skills.heading: Skills
Skills.paragraph: A comprehensive toolkit for building modern, scalable applications

Projects.heading: Projects
Projects.paragraph: Here are some of my recent projects that showcase my skills and experience

stemcraft.title: StemCraft
stemcraft.description: AI-powered tool for separating music stems, with planned features including BPM and key detection. Currently under development, focused on building a fast and accessible web-based workflow for music producers.

markdown-slides.title: Markdown Slides Generator
markdown-slides.description: Tool for creating presentation slides directly from Markdown, enabling fast and structured content creation with a developer-friendly workflow.

digital-health.title: Digital Health
digital-health.description: Real-time system for monitoring and controlling MRI machines, combining backend APIs and mobile interfaces with live communication using WebSockets.

soundcloud-redesign.title: SoundCloud Redesign
soundcloud-redesign.description: Frontend redesign of SoundCloud focused on improving user experience and visual structure while maintaining core music platform interactions.

financial-system.title: Financial Management System
financial-system.description: Full-stack application for account and financial management, developed as an academic project with structured APIs and responsive web interface.

tournament-manager.title: G4 Tournament Manager
tournament-manager.description: Mobile application for managing tournaments, including match organization and real-time updates, built with a focus on usability and performance.

Experience.heading: Experience
Experience.paragraph: Experience throughout my journey as a software engineer

mid-again.title: Full-Stack Developer
mid-again.description: Maintained and evolved the A12 platform, one of Brazil’s largest Catholic digital platforms. Focused on bug fixing, feature development, and system stability across web and mobile experiences, handling high user demand and critical production issues.

mid.title: Full-Stack Developer
mid.description: Developed and maintained internal global systems used across multiple regions. Built APIs, created and maintained web interfaces, and handled database operations. Improved system reliability by fixing legacy issues and implementing automated testing.

junior-again.title: Frontend Developer Junior
junior-again.description: DWorked alongside UX designers to translate prototypes into scalable web interfaces. Built and maintained frontend features, implemented automated tests, and contributed to new content-driven products. Collaborated with backend teams and worked with a structured design system to support internal developer tooling.

junior.title: Frontend Developer Junior
junior.description: Developed a web-based account management system, focusing on responsive interfaces and usability. Implemented automated UI tests to ensure reliability and collaborated closely with backend developers to integrate APIs and deliver end-to-end features.

graduation.title: Graduated in Information Technology Management
graduation.organization: FATEC (Faculdade de Tecnologia do Estado de São Paulo)
graduation.description: Completed a degree focused on information systems and technology management. Final project consisted of developing a facilities management system designed for regional FATEC institutions, aiming to improve operational efficiency and resource organization.

Contact.heading: Get In Touch
Contact.paragraph: Have a project in mind or want to collaborate? Feel free to reach out!
Contact.footer: I'm always interested in hearing about new projects and opportunities. Whether you have a question or just want to say hi, I'll try my best to get back to you!
